name: Billwerk+
description: European subscription management and recurring billing platform with EU-hosted infrastructure and PSD2/SEPA support.

seo.title: Billwerk+ — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Billwerk+: European subscription management and recurring billing platform with EU-hosted infrastructure and PSD2/SEPA support.

when_to_use: SEPA Direct Debit recurring billing for European subscription SaaS
PSD2-compliant payment flows for EU-hosted subscription products
Subscription lifecycle management with EU data residency requirements
Multi-currency billing for SaaS expanding across European markets

pros: EU-hosted infrastructure satisfies GDPR and data residency
Native PSD2 SCA and SEPA Direct Debit support
Strong European payment method coverage (Klarna, iDEAL, Bancontact)
Handles German/Nordic tax and invoicing rules correctly
cons: Limited adoption outside Europe; weak US payment ecosystem
UI feels dated compared to newer competitors
Documentation gaps for advanced API workflows
Pricing opaque; requires sales call for real numbers
review.verdict: The pragmatic billing choice for European SaaS needing compliance-grade SEPA and PSD2 without US-first tooling.
review.best_for: DACH and Nordic SaaS prioritizing EU data residency and local payment methods.
review.not_for: US-centric SaaS or teams wanting modern developer experience and polished UI.
